languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, Зарков уже должен быть окрашен черным и красным. Нет смысла приумножать насыщенность этих цветов. Погонщицы идут на варп-влияние. Если это допущение справедливо — мы могли бы создать в гробнице постоянную варп-приманку, и Погонщицы бы попросту не покидали его".

"Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, Зарков уже должен быть окрашен черным и красным. Нет смысла приумножать насыщенность этих цветов. Погонщицы идут на варп-влияние. Если это допущение справедливо — мы могли бы создать в гробнице постоянную варп-приманку, и Погонщицы бы попросту не покидали его".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

"Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent micro-rift inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

"Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent micro-rift inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

"Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

languages.text: 「艦長、ザルコフはすでに黒と赤に染まっているはずです。その色をさらに濃くする意味はありません。ドルーバーはワープエネルギーに引き寄せられます。もしこの仮説が正しいなら―墓の内部に恒久的なマイクロ・リフトを作り、ドルーバーは決して去らないでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent micro-rift inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、ザルコフはすでに黒と赤に染まっているはずです。その色をさらに濃くする意味はありません。ドルーバーはワープエネルギーに引き寄せられます。もしこの仮説が正しいなら―墓の内部に恒久的なマイクロ・リフトを作り、ドルーバーは決して去らないでしょう。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, Zarkov ya se ha teñido de negro y rojo. No tiene sentido aumentar la saturación de esos tonos. Los Pastores se ven atraídos por las energías de la disformidad. Si la hipótesis es correcta, podemos crear un cebo de disformidad en la tumba y los Pastores se quedarán allí eternamente».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, Zarkov ya se ha teñido de negro y rojo. No tiene sentido aumentar la saturación de esos tonos. Los Pastores se ven atraídos por las energías de la disformidad. Si la hipótesis es correcta, podemos crear un cebo de disformidad en la tumba y los Pastores se quedarán allí eternamente».

languages.text: “舰长大人，整个扎尔科夫已经是焦土和血染之地了，再加深这黑红两色实在毫无意义。拒生花受亚空间能量吸引——如果这一理论成立，我们完全可以在墓穴内制造永久的亚空间诱饵，如此一来，拒生花就会永远驻留在那里。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，整个扎尔科夫已经是焦土和血染之地了，再加深这黑红两色实在毫无意义。拒生花受亚空间能量吸引——如果这一理论成立，我们完全可以在墓穴内制造永久的亚空间诱饵，如此一来，拒生花就会永远驻留在那里。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov versinkt bereits in Schwarz und Rot. Es macht keinen Sinn, die Sättigung dieser Farben zu verstärken. Die Treiber werden von Warpenergien angezogen. Sollte diese Hypothese zutreffen ... können wir im Inneren des Grabes einen Warpsog erzeugen, dann würden die Treiber für immer bleiben."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov versinkt bereits in Schwarz und Rot. Es macht keinen Sinn, die Sättigung dieser Farben zu verstärken. Die Treiber werden von Warpenergien angezogen. Sollte diese Hypothese zutreffen ... können wir im Inneren des Grabes einen Warpsog erzeugen, dann würden die Treiber für immer bleiben."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, Zarkov zaten siyaha ve kırmızıya bulanmış durumda. Bu tonların doygunluğunu artırmanın bir anlamı yok. Çobanlar, öteboyut enerjilerine çekiliyor. Eğer bu hipotez tutarsa... Mezarın içinde kalıcı bir öteboyut tuzağı oluşturabiliriz ve o zaman Çobanlar oradan asla ayrılmaz."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, Zarkov zaten siyaha ve kırmızıya bulanmış durumda. Bu tonların doygunluğunu artırmanın bir anlamı yok. Çobanlar, öteboyut enerjilerine çekiliyor. Eğer bu hipotez tutarsa... Mezarın içinde kalıcı bir öteboyut tuzağı oluşturabiliriz ve o zaman Çobanlar oradan asla ayrılmaz."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, Zarkov devrait déjà être recouverte de noir et rouge. Intensifier la saturation de ces teintes ne nous mènera nulle part. Les Chasseurs sont attirés par les énergies du Warp. Si cette hypothèse se confirme, nous pourrions créer un piège du Warp permanent au cœur du tombeau. Ainsi, les Chasseurs ne le quitteraient jamais. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, Zarkov should already be steeped in black and red. There is no sense in increasing the saturation of those hues. The Drovers are drawn to warp energies. If that hypothesis holds — we could create a permanent warp lure inside the tomb, and then the Drovers would simply never leave."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, Zarkov devrait déjà être recouverte de noir et rouge. Intensifier la saturation de ces teintes ne nous mènera nulle part. Les Chasseurs sont attirés par les énergies du Warp. Si cette hypothèse se confirme, nous pourrions créer un piège du Warp permanent au cœur du tombeau. Ainsi, les Chasseurs ne le quitteraient jamais. »
